/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/Character.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/Wolverine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/Deadpool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/Arena.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/Particles.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/HUD.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BlindBoxBattle.dir/Game.cpp.o -o BlindBoxBattle  -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -framework Cocoa
